summary: Tested Admin Monitoring Dashboard feature. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All monitoring page elements load correctly with proper data, tabs work, metrics display correctly.

issues: React hydration warning: nested <a> tags in TrustTradeLogo component inside AdminNavbar Link - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality
React hydration warning: <tr> inside <span> in table body - cosmetic only, caused by dynamic rendering wrapper

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: Dashboard endpoint requires auth (403 without auth)
✅ Backend: Webhook events endpoint requires auth (403 without auth)
✅ Backend: Email logs endpoint requires auth (403 without auth)
✅ Backend: Admin actions endpoint requires auth (403 without auth)
✅ Backend: Retry webhook endpoint requires auth (403 without auth)
✅ Backend: Resend email endpoint requires auth (403 without auth)
✅ Backend: Update status endpoint requires auth (403 without auth)
✅ Backend: Dashboard returns comprehensive metrics with health_status, transactions, webhooks, emails, disputes
✅ Backend: Webhook events returns list with count
✅ Backend: Webhook events supports status filter
✅ Backend: Email logs returns list with count
✅ Backend: Email logs supports success filter
✅ Backend: Admin actions returns list with count
✅ Backend: Retry webhook returns 404 for non-existent event
✅ Backend: Resend email returns 404 for non-existent transaction
✅ Backend: Update status returns 404 for non-existent transaction
✅ Backend: Update status returns 400 for invalid state
✅ Backend: Update status validates required fields
✅ Frontend: Admin Monitoring page loads at /admin/monitoring
✅ Frontend: System Monitoring heading displayed
✅ Frontend: TrustTrade logo displayed correctly
✅ Frontend: Health status banner shows 'Healthy' with green indicator
✅ Frontend: Active Transactions metric card (36 transactions)
✅ Frontend: Awaiting Payment metric card
✅ Frontend: Secured (24h) metric card
✅ Frontend: Webhook Failures metric card
✅ Frontend: Email Failures metric card
✅ Frontend: Stuck Transactions metric card
✅ Frontend: Overview tab works
✅ Frontend: Webhooks tab works with events table
✅ Frontend: Emails tab works with logs table
✅ Frontend: Stuck Transactions tab works
✅ Frontend: Admin Actions tab works
✅ Frontend: Auto-refresh toggle present
✅ Frontend: Refresh button present
✅ Frontend: AdminNavbar includes Monitoring link with Activity icon

critical_code_review_comments.comment: Minor: TrustTradeLogo component wraps content in a Link, but AdminNavbar also wraps it in a Link, causing nested <a> tags. Consider passing clickable=false to TrustTradeLogo when used inside AdminNavbar Link.
Minor: Same React hydration warning about <tr> inside <span> as other admin tables - caused by dynamic rendering wrapper. Cosmetic only.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Monitoring Dashboard fully tested and working: 1) Dashboard at /admin/monitoring with health status banner (healthy/warning/critical), 2) 6 metric cards: Active Transactions, Awaiting Payment, Secured 24h, Webhook Failures, Email Failures, Stuck Transactions, 3) 5 tabs: Overview (webhook/email stats), Webhooks (events table with retry action), Emails (logs table with resend action), Stuck Transactions (detection >10 min), Admin Actions (audit log), 4) Auto-refresh every 15 seconds with toggle, 5) All admin endpoints require is_admin=true (return 403 without auth), 6) Admin actions (retry webhook, resend email, update status) are logged to admin_actions collection. The webhook events table shows 1 event with 'ignored' status. No stuck transactions or email failures detected.
